title: PAYEE SERVICE - 211info
text: UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE PAYEE SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An organizational Representative Payee program approved by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to receive Social Security benefits on a client’s behalf and issue payments for their monthly expenditures. 251 NE Garden Valley Boulevard Suite 205 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Social Security recipients (SSD or SSI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (800) 301-8226 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 301-8226 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by a local partner agency, approval may take two-six months. FEES: Monthly service fee, which is determined by the Social Security Administration DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED COMMUNITY ACTION NETWORK ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
